long_description: Schematics provisioning and Orchestration are impacted by a change of IP address from VPC to Application that is being blocked by CBR. This was a change of behaviour at around 23:20 UTC on 2nd December
current_status_next_steps: The service teams are engaged and investigating. There are no obvious changes implemented at around the start time. Current investigations are focussed on the ingress controller config or the CSC proxy
customer_facing_impact:
- Schematics provisioning is failing
- Schematics Orchetration is also impacted
chronology:
Response Team Participants (add abbrev. role and name as needed)
=====================
SRE: HARINI KANTAREDDY (schematics)
STSM:  Josephine Joyce
TAM: Hayatou Yacoubou
Anusha Krishnan
CBR: Matt Brandyberry
VP: Muhammad Ali
DIR: Ganga Poondota
DEV: Tanya Shanker
ARCH Cloud Solution : Paritosh Biswas
VPC STSM: Guy Laden
SDN STSM: Sivakumar Krishnasamy
DIR NET: Priya Kannan
BP2I: ZAEHRINGER Benjamin
DIR VPC: Umamaheswararao Karyampudi
ARCH CSE: Matt Mulsow
Mohan Kumar P B
DE NET: Eran Gampel
NRE: Karan Bhatia,  Usman Javed
BNPP: EL OIRRAK Mohamed, BANY Florian
MAN DEV: Megha Bhalja
IKS ARCH Cale Rath 
SRE: Gurdial Singh
STSM NET: Shaival Chokshi
INGRESS: Attila Szűcs (IKS)
Lead ARCH: Vincent Burckhardt



bnpp_schematic_cs4422888 / https://ibm.enterprise.slack.com/archives/C0A1JTP5DFC
#cs4422888-bnpp-can-not-manage-schematics-workspacen / https://ibm.enterprise.slack.com/archives/C0A2CHFCDU0
https://teams.microsoft.com/meet/231391241601?p=CAcvc9ALFA3l7uO6GK

Times in UTC
[2025-12-02]
 23:20 Impact Start

[2025-12-04]

14:03 AAA Ian and Paul  Joining as AVM OnDuty
14:18 the IP address that is used to evaluate the role changed early on dec 3rd (actually  23:20 UTC on Dec 2) . The IP address that is being seen is not the address of the VPC as expected.
14:26 no known changes that could have caused this
14:28 CBR: may need someone from VPC to see why the header has changed
14:50 DIE NET: some changes for the mutiple services gateway feature were implemented a few hours ago but that is way after the start of the current impact
15:12 following questions from AVM, BNPP confirmed that the start time is 23:20 UTC on Dec 2
15:21 Sev 2 CIE Confirmed
15:27 VP suggests to back out a recent change to see if it may mitigate the impact. (Not clear if this is actually the cause). If it does not help then at least it can be ruled out. 
15:32 VPC STSM: the CBR rules that Schematics are applying are based on a http header. Now CPR is seeing a different IP
15:33 ARCH CSE joined
15:38 BP2I says there has been no change on BNPP side that could have caused this
15:50 ARCH CSE: theory the CSC sees a source IP, assuming it is correctly routed through the VPC, the CSC adds proxy protocol headers maybe the X forwarded 4 hearer overwriting the proxy protocol header. 
15:55 ARCH CSE:only the istio client or the curl client could add headers
15:57 DE NET  - we need to get an expert on the ingress controller config
16:00 MAN DEV joined
16:05 IKS ARCH joined
16:16 STSM NET joined
16:18 INGRESS joined
16:20 DE NET: currently suspecting either the CSC proxy or the Ingress controller
16:36 IKS ARCH the ingress controller config looks good - but team are examining a specific change suggested by DIR
16:41 DIR suggests to roll back a specific change to rule it out
16:48 there was an auto update for ingress which changed the proxy protocol behavior. Now planning to roll that back 

=============================
               FOR AVM REFERENCE
=============================
